content.content:
1	# Library Developer Expertise Index
2	# Agent: library-developer
3	# Domain: TypeScript library development — npm package implementation, build, testing, and publishing
4	
5	hierarchy:
6	  manager: cto
7	  subordinates: [none — leaf agent]
8	
9	expertise_status: "Phase 1-6 complete. 342 tests passing (1283 assertions), 99.83% coverage, typecheck & lint clean."
10	
11	knowledge:
12	  project_structure:
13	    - "Monorepo: root workspace with packages/library (the npm package)"
14	    - "Package entry: src/index.ts (barrel exports), src/bin.ts (CLI with shebang)"
15	    - "Types in src/types/, core logic in src/core/, CLI in src/cli/"
16	    - "CLI commands in src/cli/commands/ (init, create, list, view, update, history, users, comments, blockages)"
17	    - "Tests in tests/ using bun:test (describe/test/expect)"
18	    - "Test helpers in tests/helpers/ (setup.ts, fixtures.ts, assertions.ts)"
19	    - "Test structure mirrors src: tests/core/, tests/cli/ (no tests/integration/ yet — empty dir)"
20	    - "dependency-manager.ts — blockage CRUD, impact scoring (getImpactScore with recursive BFS), cycle detection (detectCycle with DFS)"
21	    - "hierarchy.ts — pure functions for hierarchy validation and status cascade logic"
22	
23	  build_and_run:
24	    - "Bun runtime — bun test for tests, bun run src/bin.ts for CLI"
25	    - "TypeScript typecheck: bun run typecheck (runs tsc --noEmit via npm script)"
26	    - "bun x tsc doesn't work (resolves wrong tsc); must use npm script or full path"
27	    - "tsconfig uses types: ['@types/bun'] not 'bun-types'"
28	    - "Linting: ESLint 9 + typescript-eslint (flat config: eslint.config.js)"
29	    - "Formatting: Prettier (semi: true, double quotes, trailing comma: all, printWidth: 100)"
30	    - "Scripts: lint, lint:fix, format, format:check, docs:generate, docs:check, quality"
31	    - "Quality script: typecheck + lint + test:coverage in one command"
32	
33	  dependencies:
34	    - "commander ^13.0.0 for CLI argument parsing"
35	    - "typescript ^5.7.0 and @types/bun ^1.2.0 as devDependencies"
36	    - "@eslint/js ^9.28.0, eslint ^9.28.0, typescript-eslint ^8.33.0, prettier ^3.5.3 as devDependencies"
37	    - "typedoc ^0.28.19 and typedoc-plugin-markdown ^4.11.0 as devDependencies"
38	    - "No other runtime deps — all file I/O via node:fs/node:path"
39	
40	  architecture:
41	    - "Tracker class is the single source of truth for all business logic"
42	    - "CLI is a thin wrapper: parse args -> call Tracker -> print JSON"
43	    - "Success -> stdout JSON, exit 0; Error -> stderr JSON, exit from error code"
44	    - "All file writes use atomic write-to-temp-then-rename pattern (file-io.ts)"
45	    - "ID generation: Date.now().toString(36).slice(0,6) + Math.random().toString(36).slice(-4) — always 10 chars"
46	    - "Resolution: walk up from cwd looking for .trackgentic/ dir, return abs path or null"
47	    - "Tracker.init() creates .trackgentic/ with config.json, index.json, dependencies.json, users.json, issues/"
48	    - "Init is idempotent: returns ALREADY_INITIALIZED if dir exists, does NOT overwrite"
49	    - "Event-sourced: each issue stored as JSON array of events in issues/[id].json"
50	    - "Two events on creation: creation event + update event with initial fields"
51	    - "computeState() replays events to produce ComputedIssue (title, desc, status, priority, assignee, parentId, tags)"
52	    - "computeComments() in events.ts replays events to produce array of ComputedComment (with content, author, timestamps, deletion status)"
53	    - "Index manager maintains sorted arrays (open/closed) + childrenOf map for fast lookups"
54	    - "Index entries updated on create/update; binary search for lookups"
55	    - "Index manager has addChild, removeChild, getChildren for childrenOf map management"
56	    - "Auth: resolveAuthor() checks token -> mode (open/read-only/strict) -> defaultUser fallback"
57	    - "Auth reads TRACKGENTIC_USER_TOKEN env var; tokens are tk_ + 8 random alphanumeric chars"
58	    - "Users register is bootstrap (no auth required); list requires read auth; revoke/regenerate require write auth"
59	    - "Token regeneration is self-service only (caller must be the target user)"
60	    - "Hierarchy module (hierarchy.ts): pure functions — isStatusAfter, validateNewChild, validateParentStatusChange, getClosableChildren, computeUpwardPromotions"
61	    - "Issue create() validates parentId: parent must exist, not be closed, child added to childrenOf map"
62	    - "Issue update() handles downward cascade (auto-close done children when parent closes), upward auto-promotion (child advancing past parent promotes recursively), reparenting (changing parentId with constraint checks)"
63	    - "Status ordering: open < in-progress < done < closed; closed items cannot have children added"
64	    - "Dependency manager: readDependencies/writeDependencies for dependencies.json persistence"
65	    - "Blockage operations: addBlockage (appends BlockageAddedEvent to issue events + writes dependencies.json), resolveBlockage (appends BlockageResolvedEvent), deleteBlockage (appends BlockageDeletedEvent)"
66	    - "getImpactScore(blockedIssueId) — recursive BFS counting all transitively blocked issues (via children hierarchy), returns count"
67	    - "detectCycle(sourceId, targetId, deps) — DFS from targetId through blockedBy edges, returns true if path reaches sourceId"
68	    - "blockagesAdd supports batch: multiple blockages in one call, with single cycle-check pass over accumulated proposed edges"
69	    - "Auto-resolution: tracker.update() auto-resolves blockages when an issue transitions to done/closed status"
70	    - "List sort uses impact score as tiebreaker (higher impact = earlier in list)"
71	
72	  type_system:
73	    - "All types match spec 02-data-model.md and 03-api-specification.md exactly"
74	    - "API result types include | TrackgenticError for methods that can fail"
75	    - "InitResult is special: ALREADY_INITIALIZED is a valid return (not an error), exit code 0"
76	    - "UsersRegisterResult, UsersRevokeResult, UsersRegenerateResult use discriminated unions with result field"
77	    - "TrackgenticError extends Error with result, message, exitCode fields"
78	    - "ErrorCodes const object maps error names to {result, exitCode} — 13 error codes defined (exit codes 0-12)"
79	    - "Event union: CreationEvent | UpdateEvent | CommentEvent | CommentUpdateEvent | CommentDeleteEvent | BlockageAddedEvent | BlockageResolvedEvent | BlockageDeletedEvent"
80	    - "ComputedIssue: id, title, description, status, priority, assignee, parentId, tags, createdAt, createdBy, updatedAt"
81	    - "IndexEntry: id, title, path, status, assignee, parentId, tags, priority (denormalized for fast list/filter)"
82	    - "IndexFile: open[], closed[], childrenOf Record<string, string[]>"
83	    - "UserEntry: name (lowercase), token, registeredAt; UserInfo: name, registeredAt (no token)"
84	
85	  testing_patterns:
86	    - "Tests use createTestDir() from tests/helpers/setup.ts for isolation with cleanup"
87	    - "CLI tests use Bun.spawn to run bin.ts as subprocess, check stdout/stderr/exitCode"
88	    - "ID tests verify length (10), format (base36), and uniqueness (100 samples)"
89	    - "342 tests across 10 files: auth, events, file-io, id, index-manager, resolution, tracker, hierarchy, dependency-manager, CLI commands"
90	    - "99.83% line coverage, 99.38% branch coverage"
91	    - "Test files: tests/core/{auth,events,file-io,id,index-manager,resolution,tracker,hierarchy,dependency-manager}.test.ts + tests/cli/commands.test.ts"
92	
93	  cli_commands:
94	    - "init — no args, creates .trackgentic/ dir"
95	    - "create <title> — options: --description, --assignee, --tags (comma-sep), --status, --priority, --parentId, --path"
96	    - "list — options: --status, --assignee, --tags (comma-sep), --parentId ('null' for top-level)"
97	    - "view <issueId> — shows full computed state"
98	    - "update <issueId> — options: --title, --description, --status, --assignee, --tags, --priority, --parentId ('null' to detach)"
99	    - "history <issueId> — shows raw event array"
100	    - "users register <name> — registers a new user"
101	    - "users list — lists registered users (tokens stripped)"
102	    - "users revoke <name> — removes a user"
103	    - "users regenerate <name> — regenerates token (self-service only)"
104	    - "comments add <issueId> <content> — adds a comment to an issue"
105	    - "comments update <issueId> <commentId> <content> — updates a comment's content"
106	    - "comments delete <issueId> <commentId> — soft-deletes a comment"
107	    - "comments list <issueId> — lists all comments on an issue"
108	    - "blockages add <issueId> <blockedById> — adds a blockage (issue blocked by another); supports --reason option"
109	    - "blockages resolve <issueId> <blockedById> — resolves a blockage"
110	    - "blockages delete <issueId> <blockedById> — deletes a blockage"
111	    - "blockages list <issueId> — lists all blockages on an issue"
112	
113	  phase_status:
114	    phase_1: "COMPLETE — types, core (errors, id, resolution, file-io, tracker.init), CLI (runner, output, init cmd), barrel exports"
115	    phase_2: "COMPLETE — event engine (events.ts: appendEvent, replayEvents, computeState), index manager (index-manager.ts: binary search, insert/update/find/remove entries), CRUD (create/list/view/update/history), CLI commands for all CRUD operations"
116	    phase_3: "COMPLETE — auth system (auth.ts: resolveAuthor with open/read-only/strict modes, token validation, env var lookup), user management (usersRegister, usersList, usersRevoke, usersRegenerate), CLI users commands"
117	    phase_4: "COMPLETE — computeComments() in events.ts (replay comment events into ComputedComment[]), 4 Tracker methods (commentsAdd, commentsUpdate, commentsDelete, commentsList), CLI comments subcommand (src/cli/commands/comments.ts), comments registered in runner.ts. 26 new tests (8 events + 14 tracker + 4 CLI)."
118	    phase_5: "COMPLETE — hierarchy.ts (pure validation/cascade functions: isStatusAfter, validateNewChild, validateParentStatusChange, getClosableChildren, computeUpwardPromotions), index-manager extended with addChild/removeChild/getChildren, tracker.create() validates parentId, tracker.update() handles downward cascade + upward auto-promotion + reparenting. HIERARCHY_CONSTRAINT error (exit 12). 68 new tests. No CLI changes."
119	    phase_6: "COMPLETE — dependency-manager.ts (readDependencies, writeDependencies, addBlockage, resolveBlockage, deleteBlockage, getImpactScore with recursive BFS, detectCycle with DFS), 4 Tracker methods (blockagesAdd with batch cycle detection, blockagesResolve, blockagesDelete, blockagesList), auto-resolution on done/closed transitions, impact score in list sort, CLI blockages subcommand (add/resolve/delete/list). BLOCKAGE_CYCLE error. 58 new tests across dependency-manager.test.ts + additions to tracker.test.ts + commands.test.ts."
120	    phase_7: "NOT STARTED — polish & hardening"
121
